name: construction procurement officers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For construction procurement officers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes supplier penalties. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Inaccurate reconciliation of purchase orders and delivery notes
